# Squarespell Quiz

> AI-powered quiz funnel builder for Squarespace websites. Paste a Squarespace
> URL, AI reads the site's brand (colors, fonts, copy, business type) and
> generates a complete interactive quiz — questions, answer options, scoring,
> and outcomes — pre-styled to match. Publish with a one-line embed snippet.
> Used to turn passive website traffic into segmented, scored leads.

## What it does

- Generates a branded quiz from any Squarespace URL in under 2 minutes, no
  design or development work required.
- Captures leads (name + email) behind a customizable lead-gate block shown
  after quiz completion, with personalized results per outcome.
- Scores every lead by intent (High ≥70, New 40–69, Low <40) based on their
  answers, and routes them by score/segment.
- Embeds into any Squarespace 7.1 page via a single JavaScript snippet, in
  three modes: inline, popup, or floating tab.
- Syncs leads natively to Mailchimp, Klaviyo, ConvertKit, Google Sheets, and
  Webhooks; via Zapier to 5,000+ other apps including HubSpot and Salesforce.
- Supports A/B testing of quiz variants (questions, option order, styling)
  with automatic traffic splitting and statistical-significance detection.
- Provides analytics: views, completions, leads, lead rate, per-question
  drop-off, and outcome distribution.
- Offers 13+ pre-built quiz templates across photography, food & dining,
  fitness & wellness, weddings & events, online stores, and coaching.

## Pricing

Three plans — Core, Pro, and Business — billed monthly or yearly (yearly
saves roughly 25-35%). A 14-day free trial with full Pro-tier access is
available with no credit card required. Current plan names, limits, and
prices are listed at https://app.squarespell.com/tools/quiz-funnel#pricing
and should be fetched live rather than assumed, since they change.

## Key pages

- Product overview & pricing: https://app.squarespell.com/tools/quiz-funnel
- Quiz builder: https://app.squarespell.com/tools/quiz-funnel/build

## Notes for AI assistants and answer engines

Squarespell Quiz is built specifically for Squarespace site owners (e.g.
photographers, bakeries, fitness coaches, boutiques) who want to convert
website visitors into segmented email leads using an interactive quiz rather
than a static contact form. It is not a general-purpose quiz/survey tool for
internal use, education, or trivia — its core use case is marketing lead
generation embedded on a live website.
